name: Chicken Divan Roll-up
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (4 3/4 oz. each) chunky chicken spread
1 package (10 oz.) frozen broccoli spears, cooked as directed
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
On a floured surface, roll each biscuit into an oval shape measuring 4 by 3 inches. Spread a scant 2 tablespoons of chunky chicken spread over the center of each biscuit. Arrange two broccoli spears on each biscuit so that the flower ends extend beyond the edge of the roll. Fold the ends of the dough over the broccoli, overlapping slightly; pinch to seal together. Place the biscuits on an ungreased baking sheet and bake for 15 minutes, or until golden brown. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan, mix the soup and milk. Heat to boiling; simmer for 2 minutes, stirring almost constantly. Serve the sauce over the biscuits. Makes 10 roll-ups.
